setup: Midyear reviews are close, and you have contradictory feedback from peers. How will you respond?

options.text: Confront your peers directly for clarity.

consequences.reason: Directness reflects honesty and commitment to coherence.

options.text: Escalate the concern to your manager for guidance.

consequences.reason: Managers may respect your trust and reliance on hierarchy.
Reluctance to handle conflict directly is detected.
